message:
feat(cli): add ntm coordinator commands for multi-agent workflows (ntm-hecn)

Add comprehensive CLI commands for the session coordinator:
- `ntm coordinator status` - Show coordinator and agent status
- `ntm coordinator digest` - Generate session digest summaries
- `ntm coordinator conflicts` - List file reservation conflicts
- `ntm coordinator assign` - Trigger work assignment to idle agents
- `ntm coordinator enable/disable` - Toggle coordinator features

All commands support --json output for AI agent integration.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
